title: Ochna revoluta
intro: Ochna revoluta, also known as the revolution tree or wild peach, is a species of flowering plant in the family Ochnaceae, native to tropical Africa. The health benefits of Ochna revoluta include its potential anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties, which may aid in the treatment of various health conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory infections. The bioactive constituents of this plant include flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Ochna revoluta is commonly prepared as a decoction or infusion, and also used to make teas, tinctures, and ointments to treat a range of health issues.
